option.name: name
option.value: Official shadcn/ui

option.name: description
option.value: The official shadcn/ui component registry

option.name: description
option.value: Open-source community components from 21st.dev

option.name: description
option.value: A set of 8-bit styled retro components. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of beautifully designed components designed for developers who want niche, high-utility UI elements that you won't find in standard libraries.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of React components for the most common crypto patterns

option.name: description
option.value: A shadcn-compatible registry of reusable components, blocks, and utilities conforming to Vercel's components.build specification

option.name: description
option.value: A modern component library built with Tailwind CSS and Motion for React, Aceternity UI contains unique and interactive components that can make your landing pages look 100x better.

option.name: description
option.value: A small collection of focused, production‑ready components and primitives for React/Next.js projects—built on shadcn/ui and complementary libraries.

option.name: description
option.value: This is a shadcn/ui component registry that distributes copy-paste React components for building LiveKit AI Agent interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: AI components for the web. No server. No API keys. Built on WebLLM.

option.name: description
option.value: Pre-built components like conversations, messages and more to help you build AI-native applications faster.

option.name: description
option.value: 54 animated React components with AI reproduction prompts for Claude Code, Lovable, and v0. Free and open source.

option.name: description
option.value: Enterprises and developers use Algolia's AI search infrastructure to understand users and show them what they're looking for.

option.name: description
option.value: I create digital experiences that connect and inspire. I build apps, websites, brands, and products end-to-end.

option.name: description
option.value: OKLCH-native, Display-P3-aware composable fill picker with WCAG/APCA contrast metrics, gamut detection, and full keyboard accessibility.

option.name: description
option.value: A fully animated, open-source React component distribution. Browse a list of animated primitives, components and icons you can install and use in your projects.

option.name: description
option.value: AnimBits is a collection animated UI components for React that use Framer Motion. The components provided include buttons, cards, text, icons, lists, loaders, and page transitions, animation hooks all of which have general-purpose effects that are not flashy and easy on the eyes, making them easy to use.

option.name: description
option.value: Animated, accessible UI components built with React and Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: Clean, beautiful, and simple UI primitives and AI elements.

option.name: description
option.value: Radix-style React primitives for AI chat with adapters for AI SDK, LangGraph, Mastra, and custom backends.

option.name: description
option.value: Official Auth0 Universal Components for Web. Accelerate development with pre-built, embeddable UI for enterprise SSO, MFA, and organization management

option.name: description
option.value: A simple braille-inspired loader components for shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully crafted shadcn/ui components powered by Base UI

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of components built on React Aria, Tailwind CSS, and tailwind-variants.

option.name: description
option.value: Production-ready UI blocks for landing pages, dashboards, and web apps.

option.name: description
option.value: Simple and easy file uploads for React. Upload directly to any S3-compatible service with minimal setup.

option.name: description
option.value: Bespoke motion components for React. Copy-paste components with shadcn-compatible installs, Tailwind CSS v4, and Motion.

option.name: description
option.value: BillingSDK is an open-source React and Next.js component library for SaaS billing and payments. It offers ready-to-use, customizable components for subscriptions, invoices, usage-based pricing and billing - fully compatible with Dodo Payments and Stripe.

option.name: description
option.value: Open-source composable chart components for React — line, area, bar, pie, radar, maps, and more. Built with Visx, Motion, and shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of clean, modern application building blocks for you in your applications. Free and Open Source

option.name: description
option.value: Production-ready React blocks built on shadcn/ui and Tailwind — drop them in, swap the copy, ship the page. Heroes, pricing and footer sections crafted by hand.

option.name: description
option.value: Neubrutalism component library with 43 components, 42 SVG shapes, thick borders, and hard shadows. Supports React, Vue, and Nuxt. Built on shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of 150+ handcrafted UI components built with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui, covering marketing, e-commerce, dashboards, real estate, and more.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of beautifully-designed shadcn card components

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautiful, animated components to elevate your web projects instantly.

option.name: description
option.value: The easiest way to add authentication and user management to your application. Purpose-built for React, Next.js, Remix, and The Modern Web.

option.name: description
option.value: Adaptive Error Boundaries and graceful fallback UIs (Banners, Modals, Toasts).

option.name: description
option.value: Shadcn UI Blocks for Ecommerce websites

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, interactive React + Tailwind components for modern product UIs.

option.name: description
option.value: React components that render Content Blocks: plain Markdown with schema-validated directive blocks. Built for content written by humans, CMSes, and LLMs.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of shadcn-based React components, charts, animated components, and blocks built over time.

option.name: description
option.value: A new, modern UI component library built on top of Base UI. Built for developers and AI.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of open-source UI components, blocks and AI Agents. Integrate them in v0, Lovable, Claude or in your application.

option.name: description
option.value: An opinionated component library with curated styling and simplified patterns for common use cases. Built on Base UI and Tailwind CSS 4.

option.name: description
option.value: Cult UI is a rare, curated set of shadcn-compatible, headless and composable components—tastefully animated with Framer Motion.

option.name: description
option.value: Magic 3D Tabs component featuring mouse-interactive 3D rotation, floating particles background effect, and smooth spring animations.

option.name: description
option.value: Design-system registry for Delego — intent-bound action authorization for AI agents. Theme (OKLCH) plus signature components: decision pill, signed receipt, status badge, field.

option.name: description
option.value: A shadcn registry for AI and media-rich interfaces — streaming LLM chat, zoomable images, swipeable card decks, interactive maps, plus dashboard and landing-page blocks.

option.name: description
option.value: Hand-crafted layouts and UI primitives for shipping fast.

option.name: description
option.value: Accessible shadcn/ui components built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Copy-paste ready, and customizable.

option.name: description
option.value: Opinionated components and tools for building modern AI interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautiful, reusable component blocks built with React

option.name: description
option.value: Production-ready dot-matrix loading components for React, featuring square, circular, and triangle animations with polished motion.

option.name: description
option.value: A headless, composable date & date range picker for React. 5 picker types, 15 locales, dark mode, accessible. Zero dependencies.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautifully crafted Shadcn/UI blocks, designed to help developers build modern websites with ease.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, responsive Shadcn components with frosted glass morphism. Built for modern web applications with full dark mode support.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source, modern UI component library for React, built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Eldora UI offers beautifully crafted, reusable components designed for performance and elegance.

option.name: description
option.value: Full-stack shadcn/ui components that go beyond UI. Add auth, monetization, uploads, and AI to your app in seconds.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of Open Source agent and audio components that you can customize and extend.

option.name: description
option.value: Emerald UI - collection of components built with Motion, GSAP, Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A shadcn/ui registry featuring a collection of animated buttons built with Motion. Each component is designed to add punchy, interactive feedback to your UI with minimal setup.

option.name: description
option.value: EvilCharts is an open-source chart UI website built with shadcn and Recharts, beautifully designed and handcrafted.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of UI components based on the exaBase Design System, built with React and Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of UI components for building document agents and human-in-the-loop review workflows.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautifully designed UI components for building modern web applications.

option.name: description
option.value: Flight routes on interactive maps with great-circle arcs, airport markers, multi-leg journeys, and optional animation, built for mapcn.

option.name: description
option.value: Opinionated, accessible components on Base UI and shadcn-style primitives — starting with a Creatable Combobox.

option.name: description
option.value: Fluid components used exclusively in service of functional clarity. Proximity hover, spring animations, font-weight transitions, and animated focus rings.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of customizable UI blocks with interactive live previews

option.name: description
option.value: Curated font pairing registry for shadcn. Three fonts. One command. Install perfectly configured typography (heading + body + mono) with shadcn add. Includes editorial-grade type scales, CSS variables, and a live preview site.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully designed components that you can copy and paste into your apps. Accessible. Customizable. Open Source.

option.name: description
option.value: Build production-ready forms with a few clicks using shadcn components and modern tools.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful videos, made simple. Ready to use, customizable video components for React.

option.name: description
option.value: Production-ready UI components designed for building beautiful AI assistants and conversational interfaces, from the team behind GAIA.

option.name: description
option.value: Drop-in, themeable browser games for shadcn — Snake, 2048, Minesweeper, and more. Each is a single self-contained file with zero dependencies.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of fully composable components that extend shadcn/ui with a focus on common gamification UI patterns.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully designed landing page components built with React & Tailwind CSS & Motion.

option.name: description
option.value: SolidJS port of shadcn-ui components built with Kobalte primitives. 57+ components with full TypeScript support and Vega theme.

option.name: description
option.value: A shadcn-ui compatible registry distributing 40+ glassmorphic React/TypeScript components with Apple-inspired design. Components include enhanced visual effects (glow, shimmer, ripple), theme support, and customizable glassmorphism styling.

option.name: description
option.value: A shadcn-compatible registry of glassmorphism components inspired by Apple

option.name: description
option.value: Open source component library with animated components, beautiful effects, and custom toast notifications. Built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: AI-native visualization components for LLM projects. Render 26 chart types from vis syntax strings or config objects.

option.name: description
option.value: A dark, serif, glow-leaning shadcn registry of read-only components for blogs, essays, and long-form reading experiences — inspired by the quiet, candlelit cabaret of Erik Satie's Gymnopédies.

option.name: description
option.value: A premium, open source component registry for SEO-friendly, high-performance React applications

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of customisable components to build Home Assistant dashboards.

option.name: description
option.value: A Minimalistic Web CMS for Next.js, optimized for Cache Components.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source collection of 316 beautifully animated heroicons for your projects.

option.name: description
option.value: Ready-to-use foundation components/blocks built on top of shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Iconiq is a collection of icons designed for web applications. It is a modern, clean, and minimalistic icon set that is perfect for web applications.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source library of meticulously animated icons (Tabler, Phosphor, and more) for your projects, inspired by lucide-animated.com

option.name: description
option.value: UX4G 2.0 design system for India — many accessible React components and an 8-color theme preset for native apps.

option.name: description
option.value: batteries-included agent components by inference.sh. chat interfaces with streaming, tool invocation rendering, syntax-highlighted code blocks, markdown renderer, and more.

option.name: description
option.value: Accessible React component library to copy, customize, and own your UI.

option.name: description
option.value: A curated collection of GitHub-integrated, documentation, and developer-facing components. Self-contained, zero-dependency, and production-ready.

option.name: description
option.value: JolyUI is a modern React component library built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: Components including MobileMenu, ScrollArea with gradients, Chat UI, HLSVideoPlayer, and Marquee.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of perfect-designed components built on top of React Aria and Motion.

option.name: description
option.value: Cleanly designed components purposely built for open-source government portals.

option.name: description
option.value: Kibo UI is a custom registry of composable, accessible and open source components designed for use with shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Collection of stunning components built with Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui and Motion to use on your websites.

option.name: description
option.value: Carefully crafted landing page components and templates built with React, Shadcn/ui and Tailwind.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of social media components for use with Lens Social Protocol.

option.name: description
option.value: Modern UI Library for building media players in React. Powered by Shaka Player.

option.name: description
option.value: LMS components for building interactive learning experiences — quiz, flashcards, matching, fill-in-the-blank, word scramble, sequencing, reading comprehension, spaced repetition and more.

option.name: description
option.value: Spinners, loaders, and loading animations for modern web apps. Free and open-source.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source collection of smooth animated lucide icons for your projects

option.name: description
option.value: Composable React components powered by Base UI and Tailwind CSS — Build fast, customize everything.

option.name: description
option.value: LyteNyte Grid is a high performance, light weight, headless, React data grid. Our registry provides LyteNyte Grid themed using Tailwind and the Shadcn theme variables.

option.name: description
option.value: UI Library for Design Engineers. 150+ free and open-source animated components and effects built with React, Typescript, Tailwind CSS, and Motion. Perfect companion for shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Agentic UI toolkit for building MCP Apps. Open-source components and blocks ready to use within your chat app.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful maps, made simple. Ready to use, customizable map components for React. Built on MapLibre. Styled with Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: A personal registry of production-ready ShadCN components and utilities. Everything is built to drop into your existing ShadCN project with no extra setup.

option.name: description
option.value: A modern React component library focused on intuitive interactions and seamless user experiences.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully designed motions components. Easy copy-paste. Customizable. Open Source. Built for engineers and designers.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of hand-crafted interfaces built on top of MUI components

option.name: description
option.value: Pixel-perfect, uniquely crafted.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of neobrutalism-styled components based on shadcn/ui

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, accessible components built with Tailwind CSS v4 and Radix UI. Includes auth blocks, data tables, and TanStack Form integration.

option.name: description
option.value: Ready-made React components for almost any use case. Use as is or customise and go to market fast

option.name: description
option.value: Motion-native animated components for Next.js — backgrounds, heroes, inputs, carousels, and more. Open source. Copy-ready TypeScript.

option.value: Open-source component library of composable, copy-paste primitives for building AI interfaces (chat, streaming, multimodal)

option.name: description
option.value: Simple components for your extraordinary creations.

option.name: description
option.value: Components for interactive computing notebooks.

option.name: description
option.value: Custom parsers, adapters and utilities from the community for type-safe URL state management.

option.name: description
option.value: A design focused component library for Next.js, built for speed, flexibility and developer experience.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful OG images, made simple. Ready to use, customizable Open Graph image components for React.

option.value: Open-source components for building terms, privacy policies and cookie banners.

option.name: description
option.value: Hand-crafted, accessible components for building beautiful status pages.

option.name: description
option.value: A design system that distributes re-styled components, utilities, and hooks ready to use.

option.value: React Aria Components with shadcn characteristics.Copy-and-paste react aria components that run side-by-side with shadcn components.

option.name: description
option.value: Carefully built UI blocks for real apps and dashboards, designed to integrate smoothly from early ideas to production releases.

option.name: description
option.value: Animated GSAP components crafted for smooth interaction and rich detail.

option.name: description
option.value: Drop-in components for building checkouts, pricing pages, and subscription management screens using Paddle Billing.

option.name: description
option.value: Curated OKLCH color themes for shadcn/ui + visual theme editor with CSS, Tailwind v4, and Figma export.

option.name: description
option.value: pastebin + shadcn = pastecn. Paste your code and get a shadcn-compatible registry URL instantly.

option.name: description
option.value: Unified payments SDK for builders — handle checkout, billing, and webhooks across Stripe, PayPal, Adyen, and regional gateways with a single integration.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of modern React UI components with GSAP animations.

option.name: description
option.value: Playful pixel art style components library built on top of shadcn. Perfect for retro style projects and games.

option.name: description
option.value: AI-powered rich text editor for React.

option.name: description
option.value: Core building blocks for AI apps. High-quality, accessible, and customizable components for AI interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: Powerful and flexible rich text editor for React, Vue, Preact, Svelte, and SolidJS.

option.name: description
option.value: Animated shadcn components powered by GSAP and Framer Motion. Built for expressive UIs.

option.name: description
option.value: Pure UI is a curated collection of refined, animated, and accessible components built with Base UI, Tailwind CSS, Motion, and other high-quality open source libraries.

option.name: description
option.value: A framework-agnostic API client, pluggable storage adapters (LocalStorage, Convex, Supabase, PostgreSQL, MySQL), and React components for generating developer activity reports.

option.name: description
option.value: Customizable Tailwind and Vanilla CSS components with adaptive interactions, top-tier accessibility, and internationalization.

option.name: description
option.value: A large collection of animated, interactive & fully customizable React components for building memorable websites. From smooth text animations all the way to eye-catching backgrounds, you can find it here.

option.name: description
option.value: Modal component for react-easy-modals. Integrates with shadcn Dialog for a simple, powerful modal system with TypeScript support and promise-based API.

option.name: description
option.value: Vue-style slot composition for React - Fine-grained control over component composition

option.name: description
option.value: Production-ready components for Remotion - text animations, backgrounds, transitions, UI blocks, and full scene compositions

option.name: description
option.value: Shadcn components rewritten in Rescript, compatible with shadcn CLI.

option.name: description
option.value: A Neobrutalism styled React + TailwindCSS UI library for building bold, modern web apps. Perfect for any project using Shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Free & open-source library of 1,000+ components and patterns to 10x your productivity in shadcn projects.

option.name: description
option.value: Roi UI is a library that offers UI components and blocks built with Base UI primitives. Some blocks and components use motion (framer). Everything is open-source and will be forever.

option.name: description
option.value: Legacy skeuomorphic UI components and blocks for shadcn.

option.name: description
option.value: A comprehensive suite of high-fidelity interaction components. It offers motion-driven components that designed with motion-react and tailwindcss, that blends seamlessly.

option.name: description
option.value: ScrollX UI is an open-source React and shadcn-compatible component library for animated, interactive, and customizable user interfaces. It offers motion-driven components that blend seamlessly with modern ShadCN setups.

option.name: description
option.value: Accessible, Customizable, Rich Text Editor. Made with Lexical and Shadcn/UI. Open Source. Open Code.

option.name: description
option.value: A map component for shadcn/ui. Built with Leaflet and React Leaflet.

option.name: description
option.value: ShadcnSpace is a collection of extra-ordinary, highly customizable shadcn/ui components, blocks, and themes to build modern UIs with speed and clarity.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source set of shadcn/ui components, blocks, and templates with a powerful theme generator.

option.name: description
option.value: Shadcn blocks across standard collections and handcrafted premium collections, plus a beautiful templates. Start free, then unlock more with Pro.

option.name: description
option.value: A shadcn/ui registry with 1429 blocks, 1189 component variants, 14 templates, themes, and admin dashboard patterns.

option.name: description
option.value: A starter collection of polished shadcn/ui components and blocks built to production standards. Part of a larger Figma + React system designed to scale with your product.

option.name: description
option.value: A growing collection of high-quality blocks and themes for shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A comprehensive React Hooks Collection built with Shadcn.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful map components powered by pure SVG.

option.name: description
option.value: A growing collection of shadcn/ui components, blocks, and templates for building modern web apps.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of premium, production-ready shadcn/ui blocks, components and templates.

option.name: description
option.value: Launch your projects faster with admin dashboards, website templates, components, blocks, and pre-built real-world examples.

option.name: description
option.value: shadcn/ui-style components built on Ark UI.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful README badges as a service. A shields.io alternative with the visual quality of shadcn/ui. Drop-in SVG badge components for npm, GitHub, Discord, and more.

option.name: description
option.value: Brand new uncommon components for your Next.js project. Use with ease through shadcn CLI 3.0, featuring fast-growing components and collections that are easy to edit and use.

option.name: description
option.value: A component library to build slide decks using code.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautifully crafted motion components built with React, Framer Motion, and TailwindCSS. Designed to elevate microinteractions, each component focuses on smooth animations, subtle feedback, and delightful UX. Perfect for designers and developers who want to add refined motion to their interfaces — copy, paste, and make your UI come alive.

option.name: description
option.value: Production-ready and tastefully crafted sections, animated components, and full-page templates for Next.js, Tailwind CSS & Motion

option.name: description
option.value: A modern UI component library built with React and TailwindCSS to help you build beautiful and accessible web applications faster.

option.name: description
option.value: Motion-first React primitives and animated UI components for shadcn/ui. Copy, customize, and ship fluid interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: Large collection of game, interface, retro, and voice sound effects for web applications

option.name: description
option.value: A modern component library built with shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS. Spectrum UI offers elegant, responsive components and smooth animations designed for high-quality interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, sophisticated UI components designed for modern React and Tailwind CSS applications.

option.name: description
option.value: Collection of beautifully crafted open-source layouts UI built with shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A modern, accessible and composable Stepper component for React and Tailwind CSS. Built for shadcn/ui-style workflows with registry-first distribution.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of React components and blocks built on the shadcn/ui library that connect your front-end to your Supabase back-end via a single command.

option.name: description
option.value: A beautiful library with SVG logos.

option.name: description
option.value: UI component library, Designed for flexibility, built for customization, and crafted to scale across variants and use cases.

option.name: description
option.value: Shadcn blocks designed for building modern marketing websites.

option.name: description
option.value: React UI Components, Powered by Tailwind CSS

option.name: description
option.value: Tailwind Builder provides free tailwind admin dashboard templates, components and ui-blocks built with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui to help you build admin panels quickly and efficiently.

option.name: description
option.value: Tailwind Builder is a collection of free ui blocks and components and provide ai tools to generate production-ready forms, tables, and charts in seconds. Built with React, Next.js, Tailwind & ShadCN.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully designed, accessible components that you can copy and paste into your apps. Made with React Aria Components and Shadcn tokens.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful terminal UIs, made simple. Ready to use, customizable terminal UI components for React.

option.name: description
option.value: Composable, animated map components for React. Built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Mapbox GL JS, and MapLibre GL. Perfect companion for shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A shadcn/ui registry with EchoText (`echo-text`): layered stroke text that follows the pointer—minimal setup, drop-in component.

option.name: description
option.value: A Tron-inspired shadcn/ui theme system with Greek god color schemes, glow intensity levels, and sci-fi components like DataCard, HUD, Radar, and more.

option.name: description
option.value: Documentation-style in-page table of contents with scroll spy, animated SVG tree indicator, and mobile sticky collapsible.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, interactive documentation components for your design tokens following industry standards.

option.name: description
option.value: Open source React components for rendering AI tool call widgets and rich assistant outputs.

option.name: description
option.value: A component for building onboarding tours. Designed to integrate with shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Open-source gamification UI components for streaks, achievements, leaderboards, points, and more. Built on shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, accessible, and customizable React components for your telehealth applications.

option.name: description
option.value: Typedora UI is a next-generation extension layer for shadcn/ui, designed to bring full type-safety to your UI components.

option.name: description
option.value: UI Layouts offers components, effects, design tools, and ready-made blocks that make building modern interfaces more efficient—built with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A curated collection of components that spark joy. Featuring interactive concepts, design experiments, and components in the intersection of AI/UI.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source, Production-ready UI components and blocks powered by shadcn/ui and Framer Motion

option.name: description
option.value: Primitives and components with serious attention to animation and design. Copy, own, ship.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of beautifully designed components for modern web applications.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of premium animated React components and micro-interactions built with Motion for building fluid, professional interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: Fullstack registry items to start those big features. Utilcn has ChatGPT Apps, file uploading (with progress bars) and downloading, and a way to make your env vars typesafe on the backend.

option.name: description
option.value: Web3 UI components for blockchain dApps. Includes wallet connection, token swaps, NFT cards, staking interfaces, and 20+ more crypto components.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of open source fully controlled React Inertia form elements

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of wave players and waveform components built with wavesurfer.js and shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of accessible components built for use with Shadcn.

option.name: description
option.value: Motion-rich React components for AI interfaces, SaaS blocks, and cinematic interactions. Free Wensity components only.

option.name: description
option.value: A beautiful collection of copy-and-paste widgets for your next project.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, accessible heatmap components for React: GitHub-style calendar, weekday x hour matrix, date x hour, and status timeline. Built with shadcn/ui conventions.

option.name: description
option.value: Hand-crafted, beautiful, and minimal UI components built with Tailwind CSS and Motion.

option.name: description
option.value: 10 essential shadcn/ui components for B2B SaaS: Pricing, Billing, Usage, and Onboarding. Minimalist Soft Brutalist design.

option.name: description
option.value: Expertly crafted blocks, components & themes for shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Personal well crafted components for Shadcn ui
